proof_signals.signal_text: Built or contributed to production backend services
proof_signals.context: Indicates hands-on experience building real systems, not just academic work

proof_signals.signal_text: Developed REST or GraphQL APIs
proof_signals.context: Core backend skill demonstrated through API development

proof_signals.signal_text: Experience with React, Vue, Angular, or Next.js
proof_signals.context: Frontend framework experience relevant to full-stack roles

proof_signals.signal_text: Worked with PostgreSQL, MySQL, or MongoDB in production
proof_signals.context: Production database experience is a core engineering skill

proof_signals.signal_text: BSc or MSc in Computer Science or related field
proof_signals.context: Standard educational background for engineering roles in Israel

proof_signals.signal_text: Military service in elite tech units (8200, Mamram, Talpiot)
proof_signals.context: Israeli military tech units provide intensive engineering training equivalent to years of industry experience

proof_signals.signal_text: Designed or led architecture for a distributed system
proof_signals.context: Key signal for senior and staff engineer roles

proof_signals.signal_text: Led a platform migration or architectural modernization
proof_signals.context: Demonstrates staff-level engineering impact

proof_signals.signal_text: Used Kafka, RabbitMQ, or event-driven architectures
proof_signals.context: Message queue experience relevant to scalable backend systems

proof_signals.signal_text: Owned features end-to-end from design to production
proof_signals.context: End-to-end ownership is the most consistently cited requirement in Israeli engineering roles

proof_signals.signal_text: Mentored junior or mid-level engineers
proof_signals.context: Mentoring signal relevant for senior+ roles

proof_signals.signal_text: Conducted code reviews regularly
proof_signals.context: Code review practice indicates engineering maturity

proof_signals.signal_text: Led technical design reviews or architecture discussions
proof_signals.context: Key signal for tech lead and staff engineer roles

proof_signals.signal_text: Built or maintained CI/CD pipelines
proof_signals.context: CI/CD experience relevant across engineering roles

proof_signals.signal_text: Deployed applications to Docker or Kubernetes
proof_signals.context: Container experience increasingly expected at mid-level+

proof_signals.signal_text: Worked with AWS, GCP, or Azure services in production
proof_signals.context: Cloud platform experience is a baseline for most engineering roles

proof_signals.signal_text: Profiled and optimized system performance (CPU, memory, latency)
proof_signals.context: Performance optimization experience valued at senior+ levels

proof_signals.signal_text: Used AI development tools (Cursor, Copilot, Claude) in daily workflow
proof_signals.context: AI tool fluency is rapidly becoming a baseline expectation across Israeli tech

proof_signals.signal_text: Integrated LLMs or AI capabilities into products

proof_signals.signal_text: Managed a team of 3-10 engineers
proof_signals.context: Direct team management experience required for EM roles

proof_signals.signal_text: Hired and onboarded engineering team members
proof_signals.context: Hiring experience signals leadership readiness

proof_signals.signal_text: Conducted performance reviews and career development conversations
proof_signals.context: Performance management experience required for EM+ roles

proof_signals.signal_text: Managed engineering managers or team leads
proof_signals.context: Managing managers is a hard requirement for Director+ roles

proof_signals.signal_text: Defined engineering roadmap aligned with business strategy
proof_signals.context: Strategic roadmap ownership expected at Director and VP levels

proof_signals.signal_text: Led cross-team or cross-functional technical initiatives
proof_signals.context: Cross-team impact is a key differentiator for staff+ and director+ roles

proof_signals.signal_text: Managed engineering budgets and resource allocation
proof_signals.context: Budget management required at Director and VP levels

proof_signals.signal_text: Built scalable systems handling thousands of requests per second
proof_signals.context: High-scale system experience is a premium signal

proof_signals.signal_text: Completed QA course or ISTQB certification
proof_signals.context: QA courses are common entry requirement for QA roles in Israel

proof_signals.signal_text: Wrote and maintained automated test suites
proof_signals.context: Automation experience is increasingly required for QA roles

proof_signals.signal_text: Experience with Playwright or Cypress for test automation

proof_signals.signal_text: Created test plans and test documentation

proof_signals.signal_text: Tested APIs using Postman or automated API tests
proof_signals.context: API testing is a core QA skill

proof_signals.signal_text: Performed manual testing for web and mobile applications

proof_signals.signal_text: Used Jira, Xray, or similar bug tracking and test management tools

proof_signals.signal_text: Set up monitoring and alerting (Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog)

proof_signals.signal_text: Scaled engineering organization from X to Y engineers

proof_signals.context: Roadmap ownership signals tech lead and above capability
